title: chrysanthemum maritimum var. agreste
intro: Chrysanthemum maritimum var. agreste, also known as the coastal chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing, due to its active compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. Chrysanthemum maritimum var. agreste can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
